我明呢啲點推落去呀
我唔明既係平時啲題目講入口我就識分到底係demand升定係要講Ed
我既分法係咁
好似歐洲出口車黎香港咁
歐洲既車係以歐元出口過黎
如果題目講in terms of HKD
咁黎到香港就要將歐元轉返港元
所以港元黎睇價格有改變 係movement along the curve
如果題目係in terms of euro
因為歐元價格無變 但係港元價格有變 所以demand會轉
但呢題轉左香港出口我就唔明點解係講Ed
因為係香港出口係用港元出口
而題目又係問in terms of HKD
Pish

Pish

其實你應該諗得太複雜，呢條同exchange rate 無關係
deflation 既意思係 persistent decrease in price level
物價下跌=> P(in HKD) of exports (and any other goods) drops=> Qd of exports increases because of LOD

由於呢個increase in Qd of exports 係P drops 引起，我地會move along demand curve (endogenous factor)
當demand for exports 係inelastic個陣，
% drop in price < % increase in Qd
TR = P*Q
所以TR上升 aka Export value 上升

你睇左題目要求你in term of咩 currency先
e, g
如果係in term of hkd , 咁 所有影響hk價格ge factor都會導致movement along curve, 反之，就會係郁curve (e, g影響對家國家price,.)

"人地國家ge金錢價格" ge變動，係屬於factor other than price ( other than自己貨幣 ).

講到尾即係對p軸單位，你p軸寫住in term of hkd, 咁所有唔係hkd ge change in price都係factor other than price, 咁就郁curve, 反之好似呢題咁，就郁p, q

同埋我做題目見到有題話政府降低minimum reserve ratio對monetary base有咩影響
我諗就係諗reserve會少左
monetary base=cash+reserve 所以monetary base會細左
但係答案話唔會影響amount of reserve既?

同埋我做題目見到有題話政府降低minimum reserve ratio對monetary base有咩影響
我諗就係諗reserve會少左
monetary base=cash+reserve 所以monetary base會細左
但係答案話唔會影響amount of reserve既?

It is reserves create deposit
=> Reserve*(1/rrr) = Max possible deposit created
Even if rrr drops, Reserve would NOT change

同埋我做題目見到有題話政府降低minimum reserve ratio對monetary base有咩影響
我諗就係諗reserve會少左
monetary base=cash+reserve 所以monetary base會細左
但係答案話唔會影響amount of reserve既?

It is reserves create deposit
=> Reserve*(1/rrr) = Max possible deposit created
Even if rrr drops, Reserve would NOT change

Deposit creation:
Assume initially banks are not allowed to make loans, all should be kept as reserves (rrr = 100%)

Balance Sheet
Reserve 100 Deposit 100
Loan 0

Then central bank allows banks to loan out, with rrr = 20%

Balance Sheet
Reserve 20 Deposit 100
Loan 80

Loans are redeposited to the banking system

Balance Sheet
Reserve 100 Deposit 180
Loan 80

Excess reserves are lent out again

Balance Sheet
Reserve 36 Deposit 180
Loan 144

Loans are redeposited to the banking system

Balance Sheet
Reserve 100 Deposit 244
Loan 144

If this process go on and on, it will be sum of GS
Max deposit created will be
reserve*(1/rrr) = deposit
100*5 = 500

Credit creation啊,多左錢借出去有multiplier effect

所以你rrr變都好，你係只會影響banking multiplier，同埋創造出黎既deposit

其實rrr ↓, 應該係會lead to " 存款創造" 能力↑
所以r不變底下用個r重新計多次個D, 咁先係正確做法

同埋我做題目見到有題話政府降低minimum reserve ratio對monetary base有咩影響
我諗就係諗reserve會少左
monetary base=cash+reserve 所以monetary base會細左
但係答案話唔會影響amount of reserve既?

It is reserves create deposit
=> Reserve*(1/rrr) = Max possible deposit created
Even if rrr drops, Reserve would NOT change

唔明


呢個位係幾kick
我知，正常會諗，個rrr細左，咁d x rrr底下會R↓，其實係錯concept。

其實rrr ↓, 應該係會lead to " 存款創造" 能力↑
所以r不變底下用個r重新計多次個D, 咁先係正確做法

咁依返題目咁講
rrr跌 會係deposit升 因為credit creation多左?
